sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,GLdesc,Flex1,FSitem,FSitemDesc,CC,Zone,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,RefKey1,RefKey2,RefKey3,Broker) (Select '[batchID]',GL, Name, Descr,f.FSitem, FSitemDesc, Blocked, BSorPL, FXCaption, FXCaptionRecon, Grp, CreatedBy, convert(varchar,CreatedOn,101) as CreatedOn, 'yes' as RefKey1, 'yes' as RefKey2, 'yes' as RefKey3,Restricted from COA c left join FSitems F on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL and len(f.FSitem)=7)
update TransX set Flex5 = substring(Flex5,11,99) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex5,1,10) = 'ODYSSEYRE\'

update TransX set Flex7 = substring('Co: ' + c3.COAxCo,1,254) from TransX inner join (select distinct c2.GL, (select c1.Co + ',' as [text()] from COAxCo c1 where c1.GL = c2.GL and not c1.Co in ('2103','2350','2500','3080','3090','4000','4025','4030') order by c1.Co for XML Path ('') ) [COAxCo] from COAxCo c2) c3 on TransX.GL = c3.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex8 = substring('GL: ' + c3.COA,1,254) from TransX inner join (select distinct c2.GL, (select c1.OS_GL + ',' as [text()] from (select GL,OS_GL from COA inner join (select distinct GL_From, GL_Thru, OS_GL from osAccountMap3 where Co_Thru = '9999') os on GL >= GL_From and GL <= GL_Thru) c1 where c1.GL = c2.GL order by c1.OS_GL for XML Path ('') ) [COA] from COA c2) c3 on TransX.GL = c3.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = substring(Flex7,1,len(Flex7)-1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex7 is NULL
update TransX set Flex8 = substring(Flex8,1,len(Flex8)-1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex8 is NULL
update TransX set PC = FSG from TransX t inner join COAxCo c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.co = '2008' and t.PC is NULL
update TransX set PC = FSG from TransX t inner join COAxCo c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.co = '3070' and t.PC is NULL
update TransX set PC = FSG from TransX t inner join COAxCo c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.co = '2300' and t.PC is NULL
update TransX set PC = FSG from TransX t inner join COAxCo c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.PC is NULL
update TransX set PCdesc = f.Descr from TransX t inner join FSG f on t.PC = f.FSG where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Contract = m.MapKey, CCdesc = substring(m.Name,1,50) from TransX t  inner join MapKeyRanges r on t.GL >= r.FromGL and t.GL <= r.ThruGL and r.MapKey like 'M1-%' and len(r.MapKey) - len(replace(r.MapKey,'-','')) = 5 inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = r.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Assgnmt = m.MapKey, Txt = substring(m.Name,1,50) from TransX t  inner join MapKeyRanges r on t.GL >= r.FromGL and t.GL <= r.ThruGL and r.MapKey like 'M4-%' and len(r.MapKey) - len(replace(r.MapKey,'-','')) = 4 inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = r.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex8 = 'GL: ' + substring(Flex8,6,999) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 like 'GL: ,%'
update TransX set Flex8 = 'GL: ' + substring(Flex8,10,999) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex8,5,4) = substring(Flex8,10,4)
update TransX set Flex8 = 'GL: ' + substring(Flex8,10,999) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex8,5,4) = substring(Flex8,10,4)
update TransX set Flex8 = substring(Flex8,1,9) + substring(Flex8,15,999) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex8,10,4) = substring(Flex8,15,4)
update TransX set Flex9 = x.OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 x on substring(t.Flex8,5,4) = x.OS_GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(t.Flex8) > 4
update TransX set Flex8 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'GL: '
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'no' from TransX t inner join Sets s on t.GL >= s.FromVal and t.GL <= s.ThruVal where KeyID = '[batchID]' and s.ID in ('ZGL016','ZGL017','ZGL056')
update TransX set RefKey2 = 'no' from TransX t inner join Sets s on t.GL >= s.FromVal and t.GL <= s.ThruVal where KeyID = '[batchID]' and s.ID in ('ZGL017','ZGL018','ZGL056','ZGL062')
update TransX set RefKey3 = 'no' from TransX t inner join Sets s on t.GL >= s.FromVal and t.GL <= s.ThruVal where KeyID = '[batchID]' and s.ID in ('ZGL017','ZGL018','ZGL027')

update x set Flex8 = Flex8 + ' ' + m.UD3 from TransX x inner join (Select distinct GL_From,GL_Thru,UD3 from osAccountMap3 where GL_From like '6%' and Co_Thru = '9999') m on x.GL >= m.GL_From and x.GL <= m.GL_Thru where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
